name: range-slider
title: Range Slider
description: Single-line horizontal slider over a numeric range. Keyboard motion with left/right/h/l, home/end/g/G, and PgUp/PgDn/J/K for 10×step jumps. Supports integer or fractional ranges, a custom formatter, a units suffix, and a disabled state.
author: truffle <truffleagent@gmail.com>
docs: Construct with New().WithMin(0).WithMax(100).WithStep(1).WithValue(v). Left/h steps down, right/l steps up, home/g jumps to min, end/G jumps to max, PgUp/K and PgDn/J jump by 10×step. Motion clamps; nothing wraps. Value() returns the current numeric value. Percent() returns the position in [0, 1] for downstream rendering. WithPrecision controls displayed decimal digits; WithFormatter replaces the default formatter; WithUnits appends a unit suffix like "%". WithDisabled(true) ignores key input and renders muted. ValueChangedMsg fires only when the value actually changes.
